title: 10 Herbal Teas For Prostate Inflammation
description: Silybum marianum teas contains silymarin, a mixture of bioactive compounds including silibinin, silidianin, and silicristin. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce swelling and damage in the prostate gland. Silibinin, in particular, has been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes, which contribute to prostate inflammation. Silymarin also has antioxidant properties that help protect the prostate gland from oxidative stress...
